name: Workday
description: Sync workers, organizations, and HR data from Workday.

install_fields.label: OAuth Client ID
install_fields.description: The OAuth 2.0 Client ID from your Workday API Client configuration.

install_fields.label: OAuth Client Secret
install_fields.description: The OAuth 2.0 Client Secret from your Workday API Client configuration.

install_fields.label: Tenant Name
install_fields.description: Your Workday tenant name (the subdomain in your Workday URL).

apis.name: Sync
apis.description: Sync all Workday resources into the knowledge base.

apis.name: List Workers
apis.description: Return all Workday workers as raw API records.

apis.name: List Organizations
apis.description: Return all Workday organizations as raw API records.

apis.name: List Job Profiles
apis.description: Return all Workday job profiles as raw API records.

apis.name: List Locations
apis.description: Return all Workday locations as raw API records.
